text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a meet and greet happening at the
academy today. A group of kids are waiting
onstage, bubbling with excitement.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And now, on to the next activity, "Fun 'n' Games
with the Racers!"

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa... I wonder if I can handle all of them...
But—

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Okay, who wants to play tag?! First one here gets
to be it!

text_block_list.name: Little Girl
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm it!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urara gets along with the kids so naturally... I-I
have to try to do the same!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, everyone! Do you wanna—want to play
with B-Big Sis Doto?

text_block_list.name: Precocious Girl
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? What, you wanna play with us?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Y-yes!

text_block_list.name: Precocious Girl
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess it wouldn't hurt. Whatcha think,
Boss?

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
So be it. Just know that the Brat Brigade isn't soft
on any newbies! You'll have your work cut out for
you, understand?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay! Thank you, thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she struggles in the beginning, Meisho
Doto tries her best as the newest member of the
group.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I... I can't keep up! They're so full of energy!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Hey, keep your head in the game! It's against the
rules to let your guard down in cops and robbers!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but, Boss... all the robbers besides us have
already been caught.

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Fool! That's why we're gonna break our comrades
outta jail and make a huge comeback!

text_block_list.name: Energetic Boy
text_block_list.text: Guys, I found their boss! Let's get her!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, they're gonna catch her and put her in jail!
She... She needs me!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text: Wha?! What're you doing, newbie?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I'll hold them back! Boss, you go save everyone
in jail!

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Ngh! ...Newbie, I'll never forget the sacrifice you
made!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The meet and greet event continues with
occasional instances of dramatic suspense.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
And with that, our day of fun and games has
come to an end! Everyone, take care on the way
home!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ph-phew... I'm exhausted. I don't think the kids
really liked me in the end... They just ordered me
around every which way.

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text: I don't wanna say goodbye! Come with us, Doto!

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's keep playing together! Pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-oh my gosh! There there, everyone! Don't cry!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, it's okay! But wow! Sounds like you all
had a blast playing with Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...D-do you really think so?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Of course! They wouldn't be bawling their eyes
out if they didn't!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-really?! I thought I was doing a bad job, but actually... sniffle... Now I might start crying tooo!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, hey, e-everyone, it'll be all right! The event's
done for the day, but I'll always be here at the
academy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So let's... play together again whenever you all
want!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto gently comforts the kids before they
reluctantly part ways.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, hey, e-everyone, it'll be all right! The event's
done for the day, but I'll always be—

text_block_list.name: Girl Boss
text_block_list.text:
Get her, comrades! We're taking Doto back with
us!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Where are you taking meeee?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Helpless against the combined might of the
impassioned kids, Meisho Doto is dragged away.
